pages.title: About Holiday Kenya Safaris
pages.excerpt: How Holiday Kenya Safaris helps local travellers choose Kenya trips, with support from Ashford Tours & Travel.
pages.content:
Holiday Kenya Safaris helps travellers in Kenya explore domestic safaris, local excursions, coast experiences and group trips with the details they need to choose well.

A practical route into a Kenya trip

Each tour keeps its route, duration, itinerary and trip notes in one place. Compare the options, then request a quote for your dates and group.

Operated by Ashford Tours & Travel

Holiday Kenya Safaris is operated by Ashford Tours & Travel. Choose your trip here, then speak with the Ashford team about your dates, group and quote.

Choose a trip before you request a quote

Browse the tours, open the trip that suits you, and use its WhatsApp quote button to share your dates and group size.

Browse all tours

pages.title: Group Travel in Kenya
pages.excerpt: A clear starting point for family, friends, corporate, community and school trip organizers.
pages.content:
Planning for several people means balancing the route, dates, departure town, transport, accommodation and budget. Choose a destination and tour, then add your group details below.

Trips for different kinds of groups

Work and corporate groups

Share the purpose, headcount, preferred dates and departure town.

Chamas, churches and SACCOs

Keep the chosen trip and group requirements clear for everyone coordinating the decision.

Schools and youth groups

Begin with the age group, headcount, dates, route and the practical details your organiser needs confirmed.

Family and friend groups

Share who is travelling, the date or month, departure town and the comfort level your group has in mind.

What to have ready

  • The tour or destination you are considering.
  • Your preferred date or month.
  • The number of adults and children.
  • Your departure town.
  • Any transport, accommodation or budget preference that should shape the quote.
Choose a tour

pages.title: Contact Holiday Kenya Safaris
pages.excerpt: Choose a tour or use the official Holiday Kenya Safaris contact details to start a conversation.
pages.content:
For a tour quote, choose a trip first and use its WhatsApp quote button. You can then share your preferred dates and group size.

Choose your tour

Explore the tours, select the trip you are interested in, and request a tailored quote from that tour page.

Browse all tours

Contact Holiday Kenya Safaris

WhatsApp or call +254 712 965 131, or email info@holidaykenyasafaris.ke.
